title: Floor Identity Check Schema
description: Schema for validating identity-check payloads produced by future generation/mutation systems.

identity_check_id.description: Unique identifier for this identity check result.

floor_id.description: The ID of the floor being checked.

original_layout_seed.description: The layout seed of the original floor instance.

mutated_layout_seed.description: The layout seed of the mutated floor instance.

source_mutation_event_id.description: The ID of the mutation event that created this mutated floor.

anchors_checked.description: List of identity anchors that were checked.

forbidden_results_detected.description: List of forbidden mutation results detected.

entry_reachable.description: True if the floor's entry point is reachable.

exit_reachable.description: True if the floor's exit point is reachable.

primary_route_exists.description: True if at least one primary route from entry to objective exists.

landmark_continuity_score.description: Score indicating how well major landmarks were preserved (0.0 - 1.0).

theme_continuity_score.description: Score indicating how well the floor's original theme was preserved (0.0 - 1.0).

secret_discoverability_score.description: Score indicating how well secrets remain discoverable (0.0 - 1.0).

identity_status.description: Overall status of the floor's identity after mutation.

playability_preserved.description: True if the mutated floor is considered playable.
